title: nidorella resedifolia subsp. frutescens
intro: Nidorella resedifolia subsp. frutescens, commonly known as the Cape daisy bush, is a shrubby plant species within the Asteraceae family, native to southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Nidorella resedifolia subsp. frutescens include reducing inflammation, treating fever, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to soothe digestive issues and alleviate cold symptoms.
